title: DRDO ITR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 Posts
short_info: Integrated Test Range (DRDO ITR) Recruitment 2026: Integrated Test Range has released the official notification for 27 Paid Internship posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for this internship.

qualification.education_qualification: Final Year BTech/MTech in Engineering disciplines, Final Year M.Sc. in Physics
qualification.details: Final Year of BTech / MTech or Final Year M.Sc. in Electronics Engg/ECE, Electrical Engg., Comp. Sc. Engg., Mechanical Engg., Aero Space Engg., Physics.

selection_process: Merit based or Interaction over VC/Telephone
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
